_comment: Deterministic hazard rules. Lantern scans scene/description text for these keywords and surfaces transparent, rule-based safety warnings. This is code, not model judgement — so it is predictable and cannot be hijacked by text inside an image.

rules.advice: Possible fire or heat source. Keep your distance and check whether it is switched off.
A sharp object may be nearby. Reach slowly and handle with care.
Possible steps or a drop ahead. Move slowly and feel for the edge before stepping.
The floor may be wet and slippery.
Something may be hot. Avoid touching surfaces directly until you have checked.
Possible traffic or a platform edge nearby. Do not step forward until you are certain it is safe.
There may be an obstacle on the floor in your path.
Possible electrical hazard. Avoid contact and ask for assistance.
